raw_consumer_statement: I timely filed complaints for incidents involving XXXX and XXXX XXXX. Problems with vendor continued. I refiled main complaints, i.e. complaint involving stream of complaints against vendor -- both known to turn the refunds or transactions around, i.e. issues full refund and later reverses refund and issues partial credit without notice and without report of what credit is for ( too subjective in decision making ), and bank also does not report when such change occurs. Criminal activities usually accompany such actions, such as stealing statements and record keeping and replacing with new statements, even if temporarily. After refiling main complaints, BarclaysCard stopped communicating. Didn't assist.
